ListInstance.Title: Foleon Content Registry
ListInstance.Description: Governed registry of Foleon publications surfaced by the Foleon SPFx webpart. Runtime binds by list GUID; this provisioning feature creates the list, its fields, indexes, and recommended views.

ListInstance.Title: Foleon Homepage Placements
ListInstance.Description: Curated homepage placements for Foleon publications. Lookup binds to the Foleon Content Registry via the ContentLookup field; admins also populate ContentIdCache with the target record's FoleonDocId so the Highlights query can resolve without expanding the lookup.

ListInstance.Title: Foleon Interaction Events
ListInstance.Description: High-volume telemetry sink for the Foleon SPFx webpart. Versioning is disabled on this list. Raw search text is never written; callers use the ClientInfoJson field for the governed envelope.

ListInstance.Title: Foleon Sync Runs
ListInstance.Description: Operational log of Foleon sync jobs. Provisioned ahead of Wave 02 backend writers so the contract and indexes are stable before any writer ships. Expected to be empty at launch.
